name: weather
description: Current conditions and short-range forecast via Open-Meteo (free, no API key)

intents.name: current_and_forecast
intents.description: Current weather and a multi-day forecast for a location
examples: is it going to rain today?
how hot will it be today?
will it rain during the commute?

args.location: Place name or address. If unspecified, use the Owner's home_address from PERSONAL.yaml.
args.days: Number of forecast days (1-7, default 3). Pass fewer for quick 'right now' answers, more for weekend-planning questions.
